channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Editor's note: NPR retracts story on Justice Samuel Alito
Rep. Tom Kean returns to Congress, cites depression for months-long absence
item.description: The New Jersey Republican explained in a House floor speech that his absence was due to a depression diagnosis.

item.title: Law professor analyzes Supreme Court's final decisions this term
item.description: NPR's Michel Martin interviews Kim Wehle, a law professor at the University of Baltimore, about the Supreme Court's remaining rulings.

item.title: Much of the country to experience a hot July Fourth
item.description: The National Weather Service has issued heat warnings and watches for much of the Midwest and East ahead of the holiday weekend.
